resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def hammingWeight(self, n: int) -> int:
        count = 0
        while n:
            count += n & 1
            n >>= 1
        return count
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iteratively checks each bit of the input integer using bitwise operations. It counts the set bits and returns the total count. The time complexity is logarithmic because each iteration effectively halves the input integer. The space complexity is constant as it only uses a few variables.
